# toypackage

**NOTE: This is a toy package created for expository purposes.**

The goal of `toypackage` is to provide convenience functions for some
common tasks.

## Installation

You can install the development version of `toypackage` from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("abhicc/toypackage")
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

``` r

library(toypackage)
## basic example code
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`min_max_scale()`](https://abhicc.github.io/toypackage/reference/min_max_scale.md)
  : Performs min-max scaling on a numeric vector
- [`strsplit1()`](https://abhicc.github.io/toypackage/reference/strsplit1.md)
  : Split a string
- [`theme_academic()`](https://abhicc.github.io/toypackage/reference/theme_academic.md)
  : Applies theme_academic

- [Introduction to
